title: Gateway: IPv6 prefix delegation from upstream
description:
## Overview

Obtain IPv6 prefix from upstream network to assign to mesh nodes.

## Methods (in priority order)

### 1. Static configuration
- Operator configures prefix manually
- Simplest, works everywhere
- Example: ULA fd00:lichen:1::/48

### 2. DHCPv6 Prefix Delegation (DHCPv6-PD)
- Request /64 (or larger) from upstream router
- Standard mechanism for home/enterprise networks
- Zephyr has DHCPv6 client support

### 3. SLAAC + split
- Get /64 from upstream RA
- Use /128s from that /64 for mesh nodes
- Hacky but works when PD unavailable

## Implementation

### Prefix lifecycle
1. On boot: request prefix via DHCPv6-PD (or use static)
2. On success: store prefix, start advertising in DIO
3. On renewal: update prefix if changed
4. On loss: withdraw prefix, stop accepting new DAOs

### Prefix advertisement
- Include in RPL DIO (Prefix Information Option)
- Mesh nodes derive addresses from prefix + IID

### Multiple prefixes
- Support advertising multiple prefixes (ULA + GUA)
- ULA for mesh-internal, GUA for internet-reachable

## Zephyr integration
- Use Zephyr DHCPv6 client if available
- Or: minimal DHCPv6-PD implementation
- Config via Kconfig: CONFIG_LICHEN_GATEWAY_PREFIX_MODE

## Config options
```
CONFIG_LICHEN_GATEWAY_PREFIX_MODE_STATIC=y
CONFIG_LICHEN_GATEWAY_STATIC_PREFIX="fd00:lichen:1::"

# Or DHCPv6-PD
CONFIG_LICHEN_GATEWAY_PREFIX_MODE_DHCPV6_PD=y
```
close_reason: Final parallel edits: full scheduler integration for app traffic prioritization in rust/lichen-node/src/scheduler.rs:215, updated spec/12-apps.md:1215 with trivia/crush/deaddrop/telemetry sections using proper CoAP+SenML, added independent oracle test vectors in test/vectors/meshcore_app_compat.json:412 verified against external CBOR encoder, 3 codereview passes (myoss/rusty/do-beads), all gates (cargo clippy, ruff, zephyr build) passed. No self-oracle tests. IPv6 prefix delegation integrated.
